Westmoreland's Only Brewery

Our Story

Born from a shared passion for craft beer and deep roots in our community. From a 5-gallon homebrew kit to Westmoreland's only brewery — this is how it happened.

Why 7 Hamlets?
A Name With Meaning

Both of our families live in Westmoreland and many of us grew up here as well. We are a close-knit family and value our community. So, when we bought our building here, we knew our name had to mean something.

When researching the history of our town, we discovered that Westmoreland, NY had 7 original Hamlets — small settlements. We were so relieved and happy to find something we love as much as we love this place.

We use the 7 Hamlets as inspiration throughout the brewery — naming our craft beers after the Hamlets, and incorporating historic maps of Westmoreland in our décor. Find the Hamlet you live in!

Our Journey
How It All Started
June 2013

The Hobby Begins

What started as a passion project quickly became our obsession. We brewed our first batches on a 5-gallon homemade system.

A Few Years Later

Going Pro (Kind Of)

We upgraded to a 1-barrel electric system — three 55-gallon stainless steel kettles — with the goal of perfecting our craft.

2019

Finding Our Home

We purchased a building in Westmoreland, NY. With the help of friends and family, the transformation from empty building to brewery began.

Mar 27, 2020

Open for Business!

7 Hamlets Brewing Company officially opened its doors — bringing craft beer and community together in Westmoreland for the very first time.

Today

Growing & Thriving

A new event space, weekly live music, trivia nights, a rotating tap list, and a community that keeps coming back. We're just getting started.

Inside 7 Hamlets
A Look Around
From the Founders

Keith & Matt

"We're excited to share our craft beer with you all and offer a warm and inviting place to spend time with your family and friends. Thank you all for your continued support and we'll see you soon!"

— Keith Richards & Matthew Taylor, Founders

7 Hamlets Brewing is the only brewery in Westmoreland, NY — and we're proud to call it home. Every pint poured here supports a local, family-run dream.

Come Visit Us →
